mapper.select: select o.id, o.number, o.status, o.pay_status as payStatus, o.user_id as userId, o.user_name as userName, o.consignee, o.phone, o.amount, o.remark, o.pickup_point as pickupPoint, o.pickup_code as pickupCode, o.order_time as orderTime, o.checkout_time as checkoutTime, o.pickup_deadline as pickupDeadline, o.cancel_time as cancelTime, o.cancel_reason as cancelReason from orders o where o.id = #{id} limit 1

select od.product_id as productId, od.batch_id as batchId, od.name, od.image, od.product_spec as productSpec, od.number, od.amount from order_detail od where od.order_id = #{orderId} order by od.id asc

select id, order_id as orderId, event_type as eventType, actor_type as actorType, actor_id as actorId, from_status as fromStatus, to_status as toStatus, from_pay_status as fromPayStatus, to_pay_status as toPayStatus, note, create_time as createTime from order_event_log where order_id = #{orderId} order by create_time asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into order_event_log( order_id, event_type, actor_type, actor_id, from_status, to_status, from_pay_status, to_pay_status, note, create_time ) values ( #{orderId}, #{eventType}, #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{fromPayStatus}, #{toPayStatus}, #{note}, #{createTime} )
